query: I've built my PWA Kit app locally and I need to deploy the bundle to our staging environment. What's the process for getting it up there?
I need to set API_KEY and FEATURE_FLAGS environment variables on our production MRT environment for the my-storefront project. How do I do that?
We're setting up our project for the first time and need to create a QA environment, connect it to our B2C instance, and configure some URL redirects. Walk me through the setup.
I need to push a new build of our headless storefront to the staging target and then promote it to production once QA signs off. What's the workflow for managing bundles across environments?

We're onboarding a new team and they need their own project and organization set up for their PWA storefront. I also need to create dev and staging environments under that project. How do I set all that up?

Our production storefront needs a set of URL redirects — about 50 of them — for an SEO migration. I have the list in a file. What's the best way to push those redirect rules to the environment and verify they're active?
How do I set up the local development proxy for my PWA Kit app so API requests go to the right sandbox?
I need to upload my SFRA cartridge code to a sandbox instance. What command do I use for that?
I'm trying to configure my Storefront Next composable app to connect to a B2C instance. Where do I put the API credentials and site ID in the project config?
My local PWA dev server is throwing CORS errors when calling the Shopper API. How do I fix the proxy configuration in my ssr.js file?
